commit.message:
8353067: Optimize weak barrier check with AND+CBZ

Now that HAS_FORWARDED and WEAK_ROOTS are adjacent bits (0 and 1),
we can use a single AND+CBZ instruction sequence instead of the
previous double-test pattern.

Before:
  tbnz rscratch2, WEAK_ROOTS_BITPOS, lrb
  tbz  rscratch2, HAS_FORWARDED_BITPOS, heap_stable
  bind lrb

After:
  andr rscratch2, rscratch2, (HAS_FORWARDED | WEAK_ROOTS)
  cbz  rscratch2, heap_stable

This is more efficient and the combined mask (3) can now be encoded
as an immediate operand on aarch64.
